name: Katya Voss

special_abilities.name: Bardic Inspiration (3/day)
special_abilities.desc: Katya can inspire an ally within 60 ft., granting a d6 bonus to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw within 10 minutes.

special_abilities.name: Quick Fingers
special_abilities.desc: Katya has a habit of lifting small valuables. She may pickpocket a PC or NPC if left unattended near their belongings.

actions.name: Rapier
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

description: A wiry young woman with dark hair and quick eyes, carrying a lute wrapped in oilcloth. Katya travels the roads singing for coin, but she's also a skilled pickpocket. She's brave and sharp-tongued, and will try to rally people if things go bad. She flirts shamelessly and tells tall tales.
